impact: This advances the PP&D daemon supervision plan by proving the selector skips blocked syntax-preflight work while still keeping eligible recovery work available for the next daemon cycle.
summary: Add a deterministic daemon task-selection validation fixture for blocked syntax-preflight tasks and unchecked supervisor recovery tasks.
target_task: Task checkbox-117: Task checkbox-112: Add daemon task-selection validation proving blocked syntax-preflight tasks are not reselected while unchecked supervisor recovery tasks remain available.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
